Class Crowd

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.natural.biology.SocialEntity
org.jscience.natural.biology.SocialCollective<Individual>
org.jscience.natural.biology.ecology.Population<Individual>
org.jscience.social.psychology.social.Crowd
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named, Positioned<Place>, SimulationAgent
public class Crowd extends Population<Individual>
Represents a transient gathering of individuals (a crowd) sharing a common physical proximity and motive, but lacking the structured relations found in a Group.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Crowd

      public Crowd(Species species, String motive)
      Creates a new Crowd with a specific motive.
      Parameters:
      species - the species of the crowd members
      motive - the reason for the gathering
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • getMotive

      public String getMotive()
      Returns the motive for the crowd's gathering.
      Returns:
      the motive string
